channel.title: Taiwan Daily Insider
channel.description: Your go-to podcast for staying on top of the news that truly matters to foreign professionals, expats, and Gold Card holders right here in Taiwan. Fully automated utilizing AI.

item.title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-11
item.description: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening, wherever you are tuning in from! Welcome to Taiwan Daily Insider, your essential guide to navigating the pulse of Taiwan. I’m your host, and today is Saturday, April 11, 2026. Lets dive into the stories making headlines and shaping conversations across the island.We kick things off today with some significant financial news that will undoubtedly catch the eye of every expat and professional here. The New Taiwan Dollar, or NTD, is on an absolutely epic surge! Following a remarkable 3.07% jump earlier this month, the NTD continued its powerful ascent this morning, opening at 30.91 against the US Dollar. Within a mere 15 minutes, it had already surged by over one NTD, briefly touching the 29 NTD mark. This kind of rapid appreciation is something we havent seen in a while, reflecting strong foreign capital inflows and robust export performance.Now, what does this mean for you? If youre earning in NTD, your purchasing power for imported goods and international travel just got a significant boost. For those of you receiving remittances from abroad in US Dollars, you might find your local spending power slightly diminished, but conversely, if youre sending money *out* of Taiwan, your NTD will go further. This strong NTD is often a signal of confidence in Taiwans economic fundamentals, but it also presents challenges for some of Taiwans export-oriented industries. We’ll be keeping a close eye on whether the Central Bank steps in with any measures to stabilize the currency in the coming days.
